content.hint: 表达‘完成任务’时，常用动词搭配是 complete + 名词，比 do it 更正式专业
content.situation: 团队成员在项目分工会议上主动提出承担某项任务，希望明确责任并获得确认
content.speakerText: I'd like to take care of the budget planning—I have experience with spreadsheets.
content.speakerTextCn: 我想负责预算规划，我对电子表格很熟悉。
content.knowledgePoint: 任务确认中的专业动词搭配
content.responseTemplate: That sounds great! Could you ___ by the end of the week?

content.hint: 表达感谢对方承担新任务时，用 'taking on this role' 更体现尊重和正式性
content.situation: 团队成员因时间紧张，请求调整原定任务，希望得到理解与重新安排
content.speakerText: I'm really tied up this week—would it be okay if I switched to proofreading instead of gathering feedback?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周我特别忙，能不能把收集反馈改成校对工作？
content.knowledgePoint: 表达感谢与任务调整的礼貌结构
content.responseTemplate: Of course! We really appreciate you ___—just let us know when you can have it ready.

content.hint: 在分配任务时，'take care of' 是最自然、最常用的表达，比 'work on' 更强调责任归属
content.situation: 项目负责人协调分工，希望明确每个人的职责以避免重复或遗漏
content.speakerText: So, to summarize—Sam will handle the survey design, and Alex, you’ll manage the participant recruitment?
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下，Sam负责问卷设计，Alex你负责招募参与者，对吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 任务分配中的高频责任动词短语
content.responseTemplate: Exactly. And I’ll ___ the data compilation and reporting.

content.hint: 在接受分工后，专业回应通常会明确一个合理的截止时间
content.template: I'll take the data analysis then. Can you send me the papers by ___?
content.knowledgePoint: 时间节点表达（时间副词用于任务交付）

content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用搭配是 'we'd really appreciate it'
content.template: Of course! Editing’s super important—we’d really ___ it.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：appreciate 表达感激

content.hint: 在分配任务时，常用 'take + 任务' 表达主动承担
content.template: I’d like to ___ the presentation slides—I’ve done this before.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：take a task（承担任务）
